body_transformation: The plump rounded body silhouette retains its compact form, now clad in matte black fur with subtle charcoal gray undertones. The leaf bulb transforms into a dense, shadowy growth of jagged obsidian spikes that curve inward like fractured glass. Red eyes with white highlights become deep-set obsidian orbs with faint silver rimming, while the curled spiral tail tip gains a sharp, spiked texture of shadowy fur. Pale cream underbelly shifts to a charcoal gray, with faint silver veins tracing its contours.
signature_feature: Back growth: jagged obsidian spikes with shadowy translucency and silver rimming.
